name: LTspice
description: LTspice is a useful circuit simulation surface inside Electrical Engineering.
whyUseIt: People in Electrical Engineering use LTspice to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using LTspice as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from LTspice.
